title: MetaBreaker Tournament
description: A single tournament dataset as served from https://metabreaker.live/data/<id>.json. Contains tournament metadata, every entered player and their decklist, and the match results of every round.

source_url.description: URL of the original tournament listing (e.g. a melee.gg URL) that the data was scraped from. Empty string if not known.

start_date.description: ISO 8601 start date/time of the tournament. Empty string if not known.

limited_rounds.description: 0-indexed round numbers played in a limited (drafted) format. Rounds not listed here are constructed. Empty for fully constructed tournaments.

required_points.description: Map from rounds-played (key) to the minimum match points required to be paired into the next round. e.g. {"9": 18} means a player must have at least 18 match points after 9 rounds to continue. Empty when there is no point cut.

top_cut_rounds.description: Number of single-elimination rounds at the end of the tournament. 3 = Top 8, 4 = Top 16, etc.

players.description: Map from player identifier (matches the id used by p1/p2 in round_results) to the player record.

round_results.description: Round-by-round match results. Outer index is the 0-indexed round number; the inner array is the list of matches played that round. A round still in progress may be empty or partially populated.

ident.description: Stable identifier for the player within this tournament; this is the key used by p1/p2 in round_results.

url.description: Profile URL of the player on the source platform, when available.

main_deck.description: Main deck. Cards may be repeated across entries; sum counts to get the total per card.

archetype.description: Archetype label assigned by MetaBreaker's clustering/labelling pipeline. "unknown" if no label has been assigned.

author.description: Original deck author, if different from the player (rarely used).

url.description: URL of the decklist on the source platform, when available.

name.description: Card name as printed on the source listing. Casing and punctuation are preserved as-is and have not been normalized to a canonical Scryfall name.

count.description: Number of copies of this card.

MatchResult.description: A single match. For non-draws p1 is always the winner. For byes p2 is null.

p1.description: Player id of the match winner. For draws this is one of the two participants. For byes this is the player receiving the bye.

p2.description: Player id of the loser, or null when the match is a bye.

games.description: Game scores as [p1 wins, p2 wins, draws]. For byes this is [0, 0, 0].

complete.description: False if the match result is not yet finalized (e.g. the round is still in progress).
